items.description:
Resolution - Approving the Appointment of Various Persons as Commissioners of
Deeds for 2025/2026.

Resolution — Recognizing May 8, 2026, as Provider Appreciation Day in the City of
Syracuse. Childcare has been and continues fo be a difeline for families and
communities, serving as a critical foundation of our local economy.

Agreement — Syracuse University’s Maxwell School of Citizenship and Public Affairs,
to allow the City to receive one (1) summer fellow from the Master's in Public
Administration program, to establish’ ay10-week, full-time, in-person summer
fellowship to engage directly with an ongoing AP! project, f...

Bond Ordinance — Authorizing the issuance and sale of bonds of the City of
Syracuse to defray the cost of the 2026/2027 D.P.W. Municipal Sidewalk Program,
pursuant to Local Law 2-2021, for sidewalks as detailed in Exhibit “A”. Total amount
not to exceed $4,543,701.
Authorize — The 2026/2027 D.P.W.

Agreement - With Zio Enterprises Inc dba Best LED Group and Ubicquia, inc., on
behalf of DPW, for the provision of hardware and software to control and manage the
City’s Streetlighting system, (RFP 26-166) The contract will be for a period of five (5)
years, with one (1) five-year renewal option wit...

Cornell Cooperative Extension of Onondaga County

items.description:
2026 — December 31, 2026, and increase the total cost not fo exceed to $102,094.
YW

Agreement — With the U.S. Department of Interior, U.S. Geological Survey (USGS)
for operation and maintenance for the Spencer Street Gaging Station, on behalf of
the Engineering Department, for the period of five-years, effective April 1, 2026-
March 31, 2031.

Agreement — With Onondaga Earth Corps (RFP#262220), to lead public outreach,
facilitate a community-based design process, oversight of volunteer stewardship, and
invasive species removals and the planting of 3,800 trees, from June 1, 2026-May

2028, with one renewal option with the approval of the Mayor and the Common
Council. Total amount not to exceed $400,00, chargéd.to Account #02.70205.59200,
grant funded for over 4.25 years with no local match.
Amend — Ord.

Local Law - Of the City of Syracuse.fo add a new Chapter to Part L “entitled”
“Biometric Surveillance Law,” to prohibit the use of biometric surveillance systems by
owners and operators of places of public accommodation within the City of Syracuse,
as detailed in the legislation.

Permission — To Manager Gordon Clarkson on behalf of the Century Club, owner of
the property located at 480 James Street to encroach approximately 14’ for a historic
monument pole sign into the James Street right-of-way.
Amend — Ord.
Authorize - A License Agreement (“License”) with Hueber-Breuer Construction

Company, inc, (“Hueber-Breuer’) granting permission to use the City-owned property
located at 340 Jensen Avenue (Tax Parcel 098.2-04-02P.0) as detailed in Appendix
“A” legal description, for construction staging, for eighteen (18) months, effective May

2026. Hueber Breuer is the general contractor responsible for the first phase of the
redevelopment of the former Syracuse Developmental Center site. The City shall be
compensated in the amount of $5,250 per month, or a fotal not to exceed $94,500, to
be deposited in Account #01.424100.
Amend — Ord.
